song_name: Bruce Springsteen - Rosalita - Blues Traveler - Run Around
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Once upon a midnight dearie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I woke with something in my head[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I couldn't escape the memory[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Of a phone call and of what you said[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Like a game show contestant with a parting gift[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I could not believe my eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
When I saw through the voice of a trusted friend[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Who needs to humor me and tell me lies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah humor me and tell me lies[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Spread out now Rosie doctor come cut loose her mama's reins[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
You know playing blind man's bluff is a little baby's game[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
You pick up Little Dynamite  I'm gonna pick up Little Gun[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
And together we're gonna go out tonight and make that highway run[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is sl    -    ow me down[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Dynamite's in the belfry baby playing with the bats[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Little Gun's downtown in front of Woolworth's trying out his attitude on all the cats[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Papa's on the corner  waiting for the bus[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Mama she's home in the window  waiting up for us[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
She'll be there in that chair when they wrestle her upstairs[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
Cause you know we ain't gonna come[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
I ain't here on business baby, I'm only here for fun[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And Rosie you're the one[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rosalita jump a little lighter, senorita come sit by my fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I just want to be your lover ain't no liar, Rosalita you're my stone desire[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is sl    -    ow me down[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Tra la la la la bomba dear this is the pilot speaking[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
And I've got some news for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It seems my ship still stands no matter what you drop[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
And there ain't a whole lot that you can do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Oh sure the banner may be torn and wind's gotten colder[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
  Perhaps I've grown a little cynical[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But I know no matter what the waitress brings[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I shall drink it and always be full[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah I will drink it and always be full[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Now I know your mama she don't like me cause I play in a rock and roll band[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I know your daddy he don't dig me but he never did understand[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Your Papa lowered the boom he locked you in your room[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm coming to lend a hand[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm coming to liberate you confiscate you I want to be your man[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is sl    -    ow me down[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Someday we'll look back on this and it will all seem funny[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
But now you're sad your mama's mad[/tab]
         A (N.C.)
And your papa says he knows that I don't have any money
Woh your Papa says he knows that I don't have any money
Woh so your Daddy says he knows that I don't have any money
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Tell him this is last chance to get his daughter in a fine romance[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Because a record company Rosie just gave me a big advance[/tab]


[Verse 5]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
And my tires were slashed and I almost crashed but the Lord had mercy[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
My machine she's a dud out stuck in the mud somewhere in the swamps of Jersey[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Hold on tight stay up all night cause Rosie I'm coming on strong[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
By the time we meet the morning light I will hold you in my arms[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
